title: Visiting a Friend's Home 去朋友家做客

lines.en: Come in, come in! I am so glad you could come to my home.
lines.zh: 快进来，快进来！很高兴你能来我家。

lines.en: Thank you for inviting me! Your home is really nice and clean.
lines.zh: 谢谢你的邀请！你家真的很干净很漂亮。

lines.en: Please sit down on the sofa. Would you like something to drink?
lines.zh: 请坐在沙发上。你想喝点什么？

lines.en: A glass of water would be great. Oh, what a cute cat!
lines.zh: 一杯水就好。哦，好可爱的猫！

lines.en: That is my cat Mimi. You can pet her if you want. She is very friendly.
lines.zh: 那是我的猫咪咪。如果你想的话可以摸摸她。她很友善的。

lines.en: She is so soft! I brought some fruit for your family. Here you go.
lines.zh: 她好柔软！我给你家人带了一些水果。给你。

lines.en: Oh, you should not have! But thank you so much. That is very kind of you.
lines.zh: 哎呀，你太客气了！非常感谢。你真好。

lines.en: Let me take off my shoes. Should I put them by the door?
lines.zh: 我脱一下鞋。应该放在门口吗？

lines.en: Yes, please. Make yourself at home. Let me show you my room!
lines.zh: 是的，请放在门口。当自己家一样。我带你看看我的房间！
